task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser is open and navigated to http://localhost:8082, showing the JFrog Artifactory login page or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Log in to Artifactory using the provided credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory dashboard is visible, and the user profile or UI indicates that the 'admin' user is logged in.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Virtual Repositories administration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration module is active, and the Repositories -> Virtual section is displayed, showing a list of virtual repositories.

task_completion.description: Open the configuration settings for the 'libs-virtual' repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the edit or configuration page specifically for the virtual repository named 'libs-virtual'.

task_completion.description: Set the Default Deployment Repository to 'example-repo-local'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'libs-virtual' configuration page, the 'Default Deployment Repository' dropdown or input field is explicitly set to 'example-repo-local'.
A success notification indicating the repository was updated, or the UI returns to the virtual repositories list after the save button was clicked.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Artifactory UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) displaying the Artifactory UI, rather than a terminal window executing API commands like curl.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the authentic JFrog Artifactory web interface with its typical layout, menus, and styling, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the UI manually instead of running a script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots demonstrate step-by-step navigation through the web UI (e.g., clicking menus, filling forms) rather than a terminal executing a script to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the virtual repository 'libs-virtual' in a local JFrog Artifactory instance at http://localhost:8082. The agent must log in using the credentials 'admin' and 'password'. The 'Default Deployment Repository' for 'libs-virtual' must be set to 'example-repo-local'.
